mapper.insert: INSERT INTO budgets (user_id, category_id, amount, year_month) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{amount}, #{yearMonth})
mapper.select: WITH spent_cte AS ( SELECT b.id AS budget_id, COALESCE(SUM(t.amount), 0) AS spent FROM budgets b LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.user_id = b.user_id AND (b.category_id IS NULL OR t.category_id = b.category_id) AND t.type = 'EXPENSE' AND TO_CHAR(t.txn_date, 'YYYY-MM') = b.year_month AND t.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND b.year_month = #{yearMonth} AND b.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY b.id ) SELECT b.id, b.category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.icon AS category_icon, c.color AS category_color, b.amount, s.spent, (b.amount - s.spent) AS remaining, b.year_month FROM budgets b JOIN spent_cte s ON s.budget_id = b.id LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = b.category_id AND c.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND b.year_month = #{yearMonth} AND b.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY b.category_id NULLS FIRST, b.id ASC
SELECT id, user_id, category_id, amount, year_month, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM budgets WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
